query:
SELECT lineDescription, unitPrice, invoiceId FROM invoiceLineItemMatches 
WHERE matchedItemName = 'Olive oil' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched'
ORDER BY invoiceId
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT lineDescription, unitPrice, invoiceId FROM invoiceLineItemMatches 
WHERE matchedItemName = 'Olive oil' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched'
ORDER BY invoiceId
